actual_output:
Absolutely — I can do a quick GDPR check, but I need the thing you want checked.

Please paste one of these:
- a privacy policy
- a website/app data collection description
- a vendor/process flow
- a form or signup flow
- a draft email/notice/consent text

If you want, I can review it for:
- lawful basis issues — Art. 6
- privacy notice completeness — Arts. 13/14
- data minimization / retention — Art. 5
- processor/DPA issues — Art. 28
- DSAR readiness — Arts. 15–22
- cross-border transfer issues — Chapter V

Send the text or summary and I’ll flag the main gaps.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that the user's request was incomplete and provided a helpful list of specific items it could audit to fulfill the request.
